en: There he is. Honey, right here. He's right here.
vi: Vao di. O day. Ngay day.

en: Still can't see ya this time. Hey. Hey. Hi, Larry. Hi, Christine.
ja: まだ何も見えない。やあ！やあ。
zhTW: 我還是什麼都看不到。嘿！嘿。
vi: Toi van chua thay gi. Nay! Nay.

en: Good to see you. You okay? Yeah, thanks for coming to get me. Yeah, come on in.
ja: 会えてうれしい。大丈夫？うん。
zhTW: 很高興見到你。你還好嗎？嗯。
vi: Rat vui duoc gap ban. Ban on chu? Uh.

en: I got severe tire damage. That sucks. Yeah.
ja: タイヤがひどく損傷した。最悪だね。うん。
zhTW: 我的輪胎嚴重損壞。真糟糕。是啊。
vi: Lop xe hu nang lam. Te that. Uh.

en: You know those signs? It's true. Awful. Wait, hang on a second.
ja: あの看板、本当なんだよ。ひどい。うん。
zhTW: 你知道那些標誌，是真的。太糟了。是啊。
vi: Ban biet may cai bien bao do, that day. Kinh khung. Uh, uh. Kinh khung.

en: You got it? No. Wait, just stop. Stop.
ja: 見つけた？いや。待って。止まれ。
zhTW: 找到了嗎？沒有。等等。停。停。
vi: Tim thay chua? Chua. Doi da. Dung. Dung.

en: No, no, no. Stop. Don't do anything. I'm not doing anything. You gotta... Just stop.
ja: 何もしてないよ。止まれ。OK。大丈夫？うん。
zhTW: 我什麼都沒做。你得... 停。好，現在。好。天啊。你還好嗎？嗯。
vi: Toi khong lam gi ca. Ban phai... Dung lai. OK, bay gio. OK. Troi, ban on chu? Uh.

ja: 何もしてないよ。止まれ。OK。大丈夫？うん。
zhTW: 我什麼都沒做。你得... 停。好，現在。好。天啊。你還好嗎？嗯。
vi: Toi khong lam gi ca. Ban phai... Dung lai. OK, bay gio. OK. Troi, ban on chu? Uh.

en: My car, the gate crashed right down. We were just taking Christine to yoga class, then we'll go to rehearsal.
ja: クリスティンをヨガに送ってからリハーサルに行くよ。ヨ。ヨーグルト。
zhTW: 我們送Christine去瑜伽課然後去排練，好嗎？喔，好。瑜。優格。
vi: Chung ta dua Christine di hoc yoga roi den buoi tap, duoc chu? O, OK. Yo. Yogurt.

en: Is that a prefix you think? Yo. Yoga.
ko: 이게 접두사라고 생각해? 요. 요가. 요거트.
ja: 接頭語だと思う？ヨ。ヨガ。ヨーグルト。
zhTW: 你覺得那是前綴嗎？瑜。瑜伽。優格。
vi: Ban nghi do la tien to khong? Yo. Yoga. Yogurt.

en: Yogurt. Think that's related? Gurt. Ga.
ja: いや。関連あると思う？ガート。
vi: Khong. Ban nghi co lien quan khong? Gurt.
